issues: Character and weapon cards are text-only, lacking crucial imagery for a game fan page.
Missing a subtle film grain or noise texture overlay for overall immersion, as specified in the archetype.
The 'Scroll to Explore' indicator is visually weak and easily overlooked.
strengths: Strong and thematic color palette with effective accent color usage.
Clean and consistent layout with good spacing and alignment.
Effective full-bleed hero section that establishes a cinematic feel.
specific_improvements: Integrate character portraits and weapon art directly into the respective cards to enhance visual appeal and immersion.
Apply a subtle, global film grain or noise texture overlay to enhance the cinematic and immersive feel of the entire page.
Enhance the 'Scroll to Explore' indicator with a more prominent icon, animation, or a clearer visual cue.
